privileged_info_summary: The task is to configure a volume-based price list in Odoo. All metadata claims are verified and consistent: pricelist named 'Wholesale Partner - Tier 2' in USD, three products (Industrial Shelving Unit, Ergonomic Office Chair, Corrugated Shipping Box - Large) with volume-based pricing tiers specified at quantities 1/10/50 or 1/25/100, assigned to customer 'Cascade Distribution Partners'. All data is synthetic, created during task setup via Odoo XML-RPC API. The pricing tiers in metadata match exactly with the task description and verifier expectations.
